summary: The implementation provides ticket purchase functionality and viewing capabilities, but is missing the core lottery drawing mechanism (REQ-3), results viewing interface (REQ-4), and complete lottery state management (REQ-1). The visual theme (REQ-5) and image integration (REQ-6) appear partially implemented based on available evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend maintains current lottery round state with drawing rounds and winner selection logic
missing_requirements.reason: Backend only implements ticket tracking (buyTicket, getTicket, getAllTicketsByUser). No lottery round state, drawing mechanism, winner selection logic, or persistence across upgrades is present.

missing_requirements.requirement: Build lottery drawing mechanism to randomly select winners from purchased tickets
missing_requirements.reason: No drawing mechanism, winner selection function, or trigger mechanism exists in backend or frontend. The backend lacks any drawing-related methods.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create results viewing interface displaying lottery outcomes, winning tickets, and drawing history
missing_requirements.reason: No results viewing component exists. MyTickets only shows purchased tickets, not winning status, drawing outcomes, or history. No backend methods return drawing results or winners.
